channel.title: Harsh Bharti Blog
channel.description: Official blog of Harsh Bharti - Kickboxer, Athlete & Sports Professional

item.title: My Kickboxing Journey
item.description: From my first training session to representing India and winning national medals.

item.title: How I Prepare for Championships
item.description: Training routine, nutrition, recovery, and mental preparation before every championship.

item.title: Life of a Student Athlete
item.description: Balancing university studies with elite kickboxing training.

item.title: Nutrition for Kickboxers
item.description: Daily nutrition, hydration, recovery meals, and weight management for kickboxers.

item.title: World Cup Preparation
item.description: Preparing physically and mentally for the WAKO Kickboxing World Cup.
